$surface: First-run /dashboard help drawer + marketing-site tour teaser
$voiceCadence: calm, decisive — orienting a newly-activated tradie
$revisionNote: Sandbox auth was down at capture time. Placeholder body/keypoints scenes used instead of authenticated dashboard screenshots.

storyboard.onScreenText: Your RestoreAssist dashboard — your home base.
storyboard.voiceover: Welcome to your RestoreAssist dashboard. This is your home base — every job, every claim, every report.

storyboard.onScreenText: Six tiles. Jobs, claims, clients, field, reports, invoices.
storyboard.voiceover: The dashboard is six tiles. Jobs, claims, clients, field work, reports and invoices. Each opens a focused view — no nested menus, no buried screens.

data.footnote: One click from anywhere · no deep menus.

storyboard.onScreenText: Jobs — every active inspection in one list.
storyboard.voiceover: Jobs is the first tile. Every active inspection — Category One, Two, or Three water damage. Sorted by date, filtered by insurer, stage or technician with one tap.

keypoints: Filter by insurer, stage, or technician.
One tap into the inspection wizard.

storyboard.onScreenText: Claims — every insurer thread, every status.
storyboard.voiceover: Claims tracks every insurer thread. Submitted, queried, approved, paid. Each claim links straight back to the originating job — no spreadsheets, no copy-paste.

storyboard.onScreenText: Clients — every property owner, every property history.
storyboard.voiceover: Clients holds every property owner and every property history. Past inspections, past invoices, past correspondence — all attached.

data.footnote: Property history rolls up automatically per address.

storyboard.onScreenText: Field — moisture readings, photos, GPS chain-of-custody.
storyboard.voiceover: Field is where on-site captures land. Moisture readings, geo-tagged photos, equipment logs — every artefact gets a cryptographic chain-of-custody at the moment of capture.

keypoints: Photos signed with SHA-256 + GPS at capture.
Works offline — syncs when you're back.

storyboard.onScreenText: Reports — National Inspection Report, ready in minutes.
storyboard.voiceover: Reports generates the National Inspection Report from the job record. IICRC S500 citations, jurisdictional codes, every photo. The format insurers already accept.

data.footnote: Built on IICRC S500 · S520 · S700 · 2025 editions.

storyboard.onScreenText: Invoices — generated, GST-correct, synced to your accounting.
storyboard.voiceover: Invoices closes the loop. Auto-generated from the job and report, GST calculated at ten percent, synced to your Xero or MYOB without a copy-paste.

storyboard.onScreenText: First-run banner highlights what to try first.
storyboard.voiceover: On your first visit, a top banner highlights what to try first. Connect your bank feed, run a sample inspection, invite a junior tech. Dismiss when you're done.

data.footnote: Banner clears once you complete the suggestions.

storyboard.onScreenText: Stuck? The help drawer is on every screen.
storyboard.voiceover: Every screen has the help drawer in the top-right corner. Short videos, quick answers, escalation to the team if you need it.

storyboard.onScreenText: RestoreAssist. One dashboard. Every job, every claim.
storyboard.voiceover: RestoreAssist. One dashboard. Every job, every claim. One National Inspection Standard.

storyboard.onScreenText: Connect your tools next — integrations video.
storyboard.voiceover: Next, connect your accounting and field tools. Watch the integrations explainer when you're ready.
